name: video-2web
description: Compresses local videos for web delivery with FFmpeg, preserving aspect ratio and keeping the original resolution unless --max-width is used.

input_path.description: Video file in single-file mode, or folder when used with --all. Defaults to current folder for --all.

video_file.description: Web-optimized MP4 copy using the _web suffix by default.

stdout.description: Human-readable status, dry-run command, or error message.

--quality.description: FFmpeg CRF value. Lower values produce better quality and larger files.

--max-width.description: Maximum output width in pixels. Videos are only downscaled when wider than this value.

--output.description: Output .mp4 file path in single-file mode, or existing output folder in --all mode.

--force.description: Overwrite output files when they already exist.

--all.description: Process all supported videos in a folder.

--dry-run.description: Preview FFmpeg commands without writing files.

dependencies.name: FFmpeg
dependencies.install_notes: Install FFmpeg for Windows and add the bin folder to PATH.

safety.notes: Creates optimized MP4 copies only. It never deletes or modifies original videos.

examples.description: Optimize one video with default settings
Optimize one video with higher quality
Only downscale videos wider than 1280 px
Preview folder processing without writing files
